name: OnAREthProcessTxARPDU
title: OnAREthProcessTxARPDU
syntax: long OnAREthProcessTxARPDU(dword sourceAddress, dword sourcePort, dword destinationAddress, dword destinationPort, dword length, char buffer[], dword headerID ); // form 1
long OnAREthProcessTxARPDU(dword sourceAddress, dword sourcePort, dword destinationAddress, dword destinationPort, dword length, byte buffer[], dword headerID ); // form 2
description: This callback is called before the interaction layer wants to send an AUTOSAR PDU. This makes it possible to suppress the transmission.

parameters.name: sourceAddress
parameters.description: IPv4 address of the local application endpoint.

parameters.name: sourcePort
parameters.description: UDP or TCP port of the local application endpoint.

parameters.name: destinationPort
parameters.description: UDP or TCP port of the target.

parameters.name: headerId
parameters.description: ID which is to be written in the header before the AUTOSAR PDU.

return: The AUTOSAR PDU is sent by the interaction layer, if the callback sends back 1. Otherwise the transmission is suppressed.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
